Password Screen.Title: Enter The Password To Open The Basement Premium
Password Screen.Message: Enter the shared password to continue.

Welcome Popup.Title: How The Basement Premium Works
Welcome Popup.Intro: This app is your family movie shelf. Pick a profile, browse the library, and open titles straight from Google Drive.
Welcome Popup.Library Text: Browse by category or A-Z. Titles with covers rise to the top, and the featured pick always uses a covered title.
Welcome Popup.Profiles Text: Each profile keeps its own favorites, watchlist, continue watching, and age filter.
Welcome Popup.Favorites Text: Tap the star to move a title into the Favorites tab. Remove it there and it returns to the main library.
Welcome Popup.Play Text: Click a poster for more details, then use Play or Preview to open the Drive link.
Welcome Popup.Surprise Me Text: Use Shuffle for a random pick from everything, the current category, or kid-safe titles only.
Welcome Popup.Trash Review Text: That tab is just a holding area for broken-link review. It does not affect the main library unless you choose to clean things up.

Home Tab.Title: Home
